hero.title: Your strategic partner in staffing & consulting
hero.subtitle: CGIC supports businesses in their transformation by providing the talent and expertise they need.

about.previewText: Since our founding, CGIC has been committed to delivering top-tier staffing and consulting solutions. Our personalized approach ensures tailored support for every client.
about.missionText: Connecting top talent with companies shaping tomorrow's world. We believe human capital is the engine of every success.
about.value1Text: We strive for excellence in every assignment, every placement, every piece of advice.
about.value2Text: Transparency and honesty are at the heart of all our interactions.
about.value3Text: We adopt best practices and technologies to stay at the forefront.
about.teamText: A team of passionate professionals dedicated to your success.

services.subtitle: Solutions tailored to your needs
services.service1Text: We identify and deploy the best technology profiles for your critical projects.
services.service2Text: Our senior consultants guide you in defining and executing your strategy.
services.service3Text: End-to-end management of your digital transformation projects.
services.service4Text: Find talent who will become lasting members of your organization.
services.service5Text: Custom development programs for your teams.
services.service6Text: In-depth assessment of your processes and optimization recommendations.

cta.title: Ready to transform your business?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your needs and find the ideal solution together.

contact.pageSubtitle: Our team is ready to address your needs.
contact.successText: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: CG International Consulting SRL — Your trusted partner in staffing and consulting, based in Brussels.
footer.copyright: © {year} CG International Consulting SRL. All rights reserved.

legal.termsContent: Terms and conditions content coming soon.

metadata.homeDescription: CGIC, your strategic partner in staffing and consulting in Brussels. IT expertise, project management and recruitment.
metadata.aboutDescription: Discover CGIC, our mission, values and team dedicated to staffing and consulting excellence.
metadata.servicesDescription: IT staffing, strategic consulting, project management and recruitment. Discover our tailored solutions.
metadata.contactDescription: Contact CGIC to discuss your staffing and consulting needs. Our team is ready to help.
